title: Fossilmon
description: A Cobblemon Addon Mod for In-Game Pokemon Fossils
body:
A Cobblemon Addon Mod for In-Game Pokemon Fossils

 

Discover a prehistoric adventure like never before with Fossilmon, the ultimate Cobblemon addon mod! Dive deep underground in the Minecraft world to uncover hidden Pokemon Fossils waiting to be unearthed. Once you've excavated these ancient treasures, embark on a journey to revive them using the all-new Fossilizer machine. Are you ready to bring these long-extinct Pokemon back to life and train them to be your loyal companions?

 

 

 

 

 

How does it work?:

 

Dig for fossils underground and mine the ores. 

Aerodactyl can be found in Savanna and Jungle Biomes,

Kabuto can be found in the Desert and Savanna Biomes,

Omanyte can be found at the Stony Shore, Snowy Beach and Beach Biomes.

 

After you have found the fossils, craft a Fossilizer and right click the fossil on the block.

 

 

Features:

 

🦖 Excavate Pokemon Fossils: Explore the depths of your Minecraft world and mine for valuable Pokemon Fossils that are scattered underground.

 

🔬 Revive with the Fossilizer: Introducing the revolutionary Fossilizer machine! Turn those fossilized relics into living, breathing Pokemon ready to join you in your adventures.

 

🌟 Unique Pokemon Species: Each fossil holds the potential to resurrect a different Pokemon species. Collect them all and build your own team of ancient and powerful creatures.

 

🌐 Immersive Gameplay: Immerse yourself in a world where Minecraft and Pokemon collide. Experience the thrill of uncovering fossils, solving the mysteries of the past, and training your revived Pokemon for epic battles.

🚫 Disclaimer: We want to make it clear that Fossilmon is not affiliated with Cobblemon or the official Pokemon franchise in any way. All rights and trademarks for Cobblemon and Pokemon are owned by their respective creators and organizations.

 

 

 

 

Are you prepared to embrace the world of Cobblemon and become a master of ancient Pokemon?

Download the mod today and start your journey into the past! Unearth, revive, and train your very own Cobblemon team now.

 

 

Content:
ITEMS: Kabuto Fossil / Amonyte Fossil / Aerodactyl Fossil
BLOCKS: Fossilizer, Fossil Ores (For each Fossil)


For full support on all of my mods visit the Support Discord:

 

https://discord.gg/HrSU3t4wwF

 

 

 

Goals
